title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners:
NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NIIT Technologies South Asia Partners!
